title: JPMorgan Boosts Atmos Price Target, Reaffirms Bullish View On Spire And NJR
author: Lekha Gupta
description: JPMorgan analyst Richard W Sunderland raised the price target for Atmos Energy and maintained a bullish view on Spire and New Jersey Resources. The analyst expects Atmos to raise its EPS guidance, while Spire and NJR are poised for steady performance in 2025 despite potential tariff and IRA impacts.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: JPMorgan expects Atmos to raise the lower end of its EPS guidance range, narrowing towards the upper end, due to rate case resolutions that lower regulatory risk.
JPMorgan remains optimistic about Spire's outlook, expecting the company to meet its 2025 goals despite potential tariff and IRA impacts, which the analyst believes are manageable.
JPMorgan remains optimistic about Spire's outlook, expecting the company to meet its 2025 goals despite potential tariff and IRA impacts, which the analyst believes are manageable.
JPMorgan expects New Jersey Resources to post steady performance in 2025, with the analyst seeing potential upside despite the challenges posed by tariffs and the Inflation Reduction Act.

title: Primo Water Declares Special Dividend in Connection With Merger Deal
author: Zacks
description: Primo Water announced a special dividend of 82 cents per share, an 811% increase from its quarterly dividend, in connection with its merger with BlueTriton. The company continues to see organic growth and strategic investments, positioning it well for the future.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Primo Water's strong performance, including organic customer growth, strategic investments, and the potential benefits of the merger with BlueTriton. The company's decision to declare a special dividend also suggests confidence in its future prospects.
The article mentions that IDACORP has recently raised its quarterly dividend rate, indicating a shareholder-friendly approach and stable financial performance.
Similar to IDACORP, the article notes that American States Water has also increased its quarterly dividend rate, suggesting a focus on rewarding shareholders.
The article highlights that New Jersey Resources has raised its quarterly dividend rate, indicating a strong financial position and commitment to shareholder returns.

title: Insider Sale: President & CEO Stephen Westhoven Sells 30,000 Shares of New Jersey Resources ... By GuruFocus - Investing.com Canada
author: Gurufocus
description: Stephen Westhoven, the President & CEO of New Jersey Resources Corp, sold 30,000 shares of the company. This sale is part of a broader trend where there have been 5 insider sells and no insider buys over the last year. The company's stock is currently trading at $45.05, which is significantly overvalued compared to its intrinsic value.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights an insider sale by the company's President & CEO, which is part of a broader trend of insider selling. Additionally, the company's stock is trading at a significant premium to its intrinsic value, indicating potential overvaluation.

title: Reasons to Add National Fuel Gas (NFG) to Your Portfolio Now

description: National Fuel Gas (NFG) makes a strong investment case, given its estimate revisions, strong earnings surprise history and systematic capital expenditure.
